retrieved_result: What is an Indefinite Quantity Contract (IQC)? What is an Indefinite Quantity Contract (IQC)? An Indefinite Quantity Contract (IQC) is an umbrella contract that allows USAID missions to use the services of prequalified contractors through a limited competitive bidding process or by sole-sourcing, thereby expediting the award-making process.
